scripts.install-services: npm install --prefix book-service && npm install --prefix user-service && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix borrow-service && npm install --prefix gateway-api
scripts.dev-all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix book-service" "npm run dev --prefix user-service" "npm run dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix borrow-service" "npm run dev --prefix gateway-api"
scripts.start-all: concurrently "npm run start --prefix book-service" "npm run start --prefix user-service" "npm run start --prefix auth-service" "npm run start --prefix borrow-service" "npm run start --prefix gateway-api"
